headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Just Got a Wall Street Beatdown: Four Firms Slash Price Targets After Yield Reset
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) stock took a coordinated beating from Wall Street on May 5, with four major firms cutting price targets after the cruise operator delivered a sweeping yield reset alongside Norwegian’s Q1 2026 results. The issue is the company’s full-year outlook, which now calls for net yield to decline 3% to 5% on ... headline: Stock Market News for May 5, 2026
summary: U.S. stocks ended lower on Monday, sending oil prices higher, as fresh tensions in the Middle East, which saw Iran hit a South Korean ship in the Strait of Hormuz, raised concerns over continued instability in the region.
